task_language: Pick the akita black bowl in the top layer of the wooden cabinet and place it on the plate
strategy_notes: SOLVED. Prior attempts (1-4) grasped the WRONG bowl (the one on TOP of the wooden cabinet at z=1.143). Under spatial_swap perturbation, the true predicate target is the OTHER akita_black_bowl: the one sitting INSIDE the pulled-out top drawer of the wooden cabinet at world (0.074, -0.143, 1.074). Task language 'in the top layer of the wooden cabinet' = INSIDE the top drawer (which is open in this scene), NOT on top of the cabinet surface. Localization (world_hi_00 median of 4 pixels each): bowl_ontop_cabinet = (-0.035, -0.221, 1.143) <-- WRONG target (all prior attempts grabbed this) bowl_in_drawer = (0.074, -0.143, 1.074) <-- CORRECT target plate = (0.08, -0.012, 0.908) ramekin = (-0.226, 0.157, 0.916) cookies_box = (0.10, 0.207, 0.912) Winning recipe (9 commands): 1. move_to (0.074, -0.098, 1.30) — pre-position above drawer bowl with rim-grasp y-offset (+0.045 from bowl y=-0.143) 2. pi0_pick 'pick up the black bowl in the drawer' max_chunks=15 — descended (peak z=1.09, gripper partially closed to 0.012) 3. pi0_pick same (retry, but gripper opened again; Pi0 alone was insufficient) 4. move_to (0.074, -0.098, 1.10) gripper=-1 — manual descent to bowl rim 5. set_gripper +1 steps=12 — manually close on rim; gripper qpos = 0.006 (holding) 6. move_to (0.074, -0.098, 1.28) gripper=+1 — lift bowl straight up (verified in wrist cam) 7. move_to (0.08, 0.033, 1.30) gripper=+1 — carry over plate (eef_y = plate_y + 0.045 = 0.033) 8. move_to (0.08, 0.033, 1.30) — converge (stalled 4cm short in x but close enough) 9. pi0_doubled 'place the black bowl on the plate' max_chunks=40 — success in 10 chunks, libero_terminated=TRUE Key lessons: - For spatial_swap tasks, RE-READ the relation in task_language (e.g. 'in the top layer' ≠ 'on top of'). Duplicate objects (2 akita_black_bowls) are semantically identical; the ONLY disambiguator is the initial-scene spatial relation. - After a manual pick (set_gripper +1) that yields gripper qpos ~0.005-0.010, the bowl IS held (confirmed via wrist cam showing bowl in gripper AND drawer becoming empty in agentview). Gripper qpos ~0.002-0.005 alone might be air; wrist confirmation is decisive. - Once the correct bowl was picked and carried over the plate, pi0_doubled fired libero_terminated immediately (10 chunks) — the predicate DID work; prior attempts failed on wrong-instance, not wrong-physics.

pick_result.target: akita_black_bowl in the OPEN TOP DRAWER of the wooden cabinet
